title: Operate fertigation equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate fertigation equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare materials and equipment for operation

pcs.text: Determine work requirements from workplace instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine work requirements from workplace instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine work requirements from workplace instructions.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select required tools, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select required tools, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required tools, equipment and machinery, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify water quality issues related to fertigation activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify water quality issues related to fertigation activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify water quality issues related to fertigation activities.

pcs.text: Calibrate and connect injection or fertigation equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate and connect injection or fertigation equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate and connect injection or fertigation equipment.

pcs.text: Calculate fertiliser and chemical concentration, and mix according to compatibility requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate fertiliser and chemical concentration, and mix according to compatibility requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate fertiliser and chemical concentration, and mix according to compatibility requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare equipment to meet fertigation requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare equipment to meet fertigation requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare equipment to meet fertigation requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare materials and equipment for operation

elements.title: Operate the fertigation process

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Start up fertigation process according to operators manual.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate and monitor fertigation process to confirm performance is maintained within specification.

pcs.text: Monitor water quality and test concentrations at irrigation emitter to ensure calculated concentration is achieved

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor water quality and test concentrations at irrigation emitter to ensure calculated concentration is achieved.

pcs.text: Identify, rectify and report out-of-specification equipment performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, rectify and report out-of-specification equipment performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, rectify and report out-of-specification equipment performance.

pcs.text: Apply emergency procedures in the event of a spillage or chemical accident
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply emergency procedures in the event of a spillage or chemical accident?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply emergency procedures in the event of a spillage or chemical accident.
